notes: Recommended broker-symbol compatibility update. Adds explicit metal-cross broker symbol handling such as XAUAUDm while preserving existing suffix support like XAUUSDm, EURUSDm, .r, .pro, and +. Tightens MT5 quote selection so XAUUSD does not accidentally use XAUAUDm, improves audit/test-sender messaging for off-market broker rejections, and adds a safe History tab Clear Expired button that removes only expired signal rows while preserving routed/delivered/reply-command context.
